title: rubus omnivagans
intro: Rubus omnivagans, also known as the five-angled blackberry, is a species of thorny shrub in the rose family native to North America. The medicinal properties of Rubus omnivagans include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, improve cognitive function, and provide relief from menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Rubus omnivagans include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
